name: scheduled-copilot-agent
description: Autonomous task planning, execution, and monitoring dashboard with drag-drop task management, workspace audit, quality KPIs, and LM-powered decision support.

commands.title: Copilot Autonomous Loop: Import Knowledge Inbox

scheduledCopilotAgent.stateFilePath.description: Relative or absolute path to the local state JSON file (agent memory/DB).

scheduledCopilotAgent.importFolderPath.description: Folder path for knowledge inbox imports (.txt, .md, .json, .html).

scheduledCopilotAgent.intervalSeconds.description: How often to trigger a Copilot agent cycle (in seconds, minimum 1s).

scheduledCopilotAgent.uiContinuousDelayM.description: Delay between back-to-back cycles in continuous Copilot UI mode to avoid command spamming (milliseconds).

scheduledCopilotAgent.requireManualStart.description: When true, the extension never auto-starts scheduler/cycles on VS Code open. User must manually trigger or start scheduler.

scheduledCopilotAgent.intervalMinutes.description: Legacy setting. Prefer intervalSeconds for second-precision scheduling.

scheduledCopilotAgent.dailyTriggerTimes.description: Specific times to trigger a cycle each day in HH:MM format (Europe/Berlin timezone). Example: ["09:00", "21:00"]

scheduledCopilotAgent.copilotOpenCommand.description: VS Code command used to open Copilot Chat (fallback when LM API unavailable).

scheduledCopilotAgent.copilotOpenArgs.description: Optional arguments for the Copilot Chat fallback command.

enumDescriptions: Auto-select the first available Copilot model.
Use Claude Sonnet family if available.
scheduledCopilotAgent.modelFamily.description: Copilot model family for LM API. Use 'auto' to let VS Code pick the first available model, or set a specific family like gpt-4o, gpt-4.1, o3, claude-sonnet.

scheduledCopilotAgent.promptTemplate.description: User prompt template. ${state} is replaced with the full state JSON.

scheduledCopilotAgent.systemPrompt.description: System prompt for the LM. Leave blank to use the built-in Kami context prompt.

scheduledCopilotAgent.launchOnActivate.description: Legacy auto-start flag. Effective only when requireManualStart is false.

scheduledCopilotAgent.backupStateOnCycle.description: Create a dated backup of state.json before each cycle.

scheduledCopilotAgent.autoStopOnObjectiv.description: Automatically stop the scheduler when the agent reports objectiveReached=true or when no active/pending tasks remain.

scheduledCopilotAgent.maxIterations.description: Maximum scheduler cycles before automatic stop. Use 0 for unlimited iterations.

scheduledCopilotAgent.autonomousExecutio.description: Autonomy cadence. 'continuous' runs self-paced back-to-back iterations until a stop condition is reached. 'interval' runs on timer schedule.

scheduledCopilotAgent.completionThreshol.description: Stop threshold in percent based on agent-reported progressPercent. When reached, current focus can be auto-marked done and scheduler stops.

scheduledCopilotAgent.maxAutonomousItera.description: Safety cap for continuous mode: max back-to-back LM iterations per execute run before forced stop.

scheduledCopilotAgent.executionMode.description: Execution path for each cycle. Default is 'copilot-ui' for interactive full-autonomy sessions; LM tracking remains available as an overlay for state progression.

scheduledCopilotAgent.availableModels.markdownDeprecationMessage: Use `scheduledCopilotAgent.modelFamily` (dropdown with all supported values, including auto).
